name: Syscall Tracer
description: DYNAMIC: run a target under a syscall tracer (strace on Linux, dtruss on macOS) and summarize its behaviour — files opened, network connects, processes exec'd, and a syscall histogram. EXECUTES the target; consent-gated. dtruss needs root + a permissive SIP.

prerequisites.install_hint: Install strace (Linux). On macOS dtruss ships but needs root + a permissive SIP.

safety.notes: DYNAMIC — the tracer runs the target natively; it can do anything the host allows. Consent-gated (--allow-dynamic; runner also checks REKIT_ALLOW_DYNAMIC=1/--yes-i-consent). Timeout-bounded. Isolation is the operator's choice — run in a disposable VM / analysis box.

payload.note: BYO tracer on PATH. The core behavioral dynamic skill; complements exec-observe (surface only) and emulate-code (contained). Feed the recovered files/network into ioc-extract for reporting.
